titleStmt.title: SII 11.79: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 79. (B.K. No. 2 of 1929-30). ĀLŪR, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A HERO-STONE IN THE VILLAGE.

summary.p: The record refers itself to the reign of a Trailōkyamalladēva and is dated in Puthiva (Pārthiva), Jyēshṭha, śu. 10, Tuesday. It mentions a Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara named Gaṇḍabhēruṇḍa Manneya-vallabha Siddarasa, Chika-Sāhaṇi and Malleya-Sāhaṇi. The details of the date correspond to A.D. 1045, May 28, but the characters appear to be too late for this date. The date cited in the record is not correct for the reign of Trailōkyamalla Taila III. It is not therefore possible to say with any degree of certainty who the Trailōkyamalla of the record is. The inscription is much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷekyatraiḷōkya mallavaruṣa puthi
va saṁvaccarada jyēṣṭa suddha 10 maṁgaḷavāra doḷ svasti śrīma
nu mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ kupaṇa kamaḷamā
rttaṇḍaṁ gaṁḍabhēruṁḍaṁ manneyavallabha siddarasaru būyiyaṁ
dalu
la sāhaṇi maga cikasāhaṇi
ḍasiṁ tāti saṁnnā haṇa Āḷiṁ munuṟaṁ malleya sāhaṇiThe continuation is missing.
Digital edition of SII 11.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
